title: EpicClearLag
description: EpicClearLag: Automatically clears items and entities, protects important mobs, monitors TPS, and keeps your server lag-free.
body:
## 🌟 EpicClearLag

### EpicClearLag – The Smart AI-Powered Lag Prevention Plugin for Minecraft!

Say goodbye to lag and hello to smooth gameplay with EpicClearLag, the intelligent plugin that automatically keeps your server clean without affecting players or pets. Using advanced AI-like clearing logic, EpicClearLag detects which entities should be removed and which should stay, protecting farms, tamed mobs, and important areas while removing unnecessary items and mobs.

## ⚡ Key Features

AI-Powered Auto Clearing – Automatically removes only the entities causing lag while keeping everything important safe.

Smart TPS Monitoring – Detects server slowdown and clears extra entities when needed.

Countdown Alerts – Warns players before each clear with customizable messages and titles.

Full Admin Control – Use commands to instantly clear, check TPS, or reload configurations.

Customizable Messaging – Fully configurable alerts with placeholders for a polished player experience.

Optimized & Lightweight – Engineered to run efficiently without causing additional lag.

Multi-World Support – Works seamlessly across all your worlds.

Automatic Updates – Always stay on the latest version with built-in update notifications.

## 🛠️ Commands

```
/epicclearlag now → Instant AI-powered clearing.

/epicclearlag status → View current TPS and pending clears.

/epicclearlag reload → Reload plugin settings instantly.

```

## 🔔 Why You’ll Love EpicClearLag

Keep your server lag-free automatically, even during peak hours.

Protect your valuable mobs, pets, and farms intelligently.

Make players feel safe with clear countdown alerts.

Minimal setup, maximum performance, and full customization.

### ⚡ EpicClearLag – The AI-Clearing Plugin That Keeps Your Server Smart, Fast, and Lag-Free!
